creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 152173
Shar archive to add x11-fonts/tlwg-ttf

I didn't see any Thai fonts available in the Ports tree so I found a free package licensed under GPLv2 and MIT and added it.

WWW: http://linux.thai.net/projects/fonts-tlwg

Included selectable typefaces:
- Garuda
- Kinnari
- Laksaman
- Loma
- Norasi
- Purisa
- Sawasdee
- TlwgMono
- TlwgTypewriter
- TlwgTypist
- TlwgTypo
- Umpush
- Waree
